name: MMI Direct
message: MMI Direct is a leading data processor that specializes in providing services like NCOA, PCOA, analytics, list fulfillment, merge purge, and data append to nonprofits, businesses, and government clients.We are going to upload 116gb corporate data. Employee files (Passports, DLs, birth and death certificates, interviews and other personal documents), medical information, HR data, contracts and agreements, financial information, client information, NDAs, etc.
